Why People Love It

Real stories from our community

"My daughter's face when she saw 80+ videos from family across 4 countries... unforgettable."

Maria A.

"My friends helped me hit my dream guitar goal in a day. Best birthday ever."

Sam K.

"It felt like my whole family was in the room even though half of them were in another country."

Farah L.

"My wife's 50th board made her feel like a celebrity. She laughed, cried, and watched it three times before breakfast."

Sohail R.

Zoomerly creates interactive boards for celebrations. Collect wishes, photos, and videos for every occasion.
